prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低位次分别为3794→3362→3118→2962→4096名。2021–2024年呈逐年小幅前移趋势（从3794名提升至2962名），但2025年出现大幅后移，较2024年后移1134名，为近5年最大波动。2025年基准位次约4096名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为46人，2026年计划增至49人，较2025年扩招3人（约6.5%）。扩招意味着竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第9名（全国Top10），近年排名稳定在第8–9名，属于国内顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价偏正面，新闻传播学科排名稳居全国前列，食堂条件获广泛好评（全国高校食堂排名第一）；抖音热度为较热（总排名第22/106），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温；未见明显投档断档或负面舆情记录；第五轮学科评估中，机械工程、光学工程、电气工程获A+，计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、材料科学与工程等9个学科获A，临床医学、生物医学工程等6个学科获A-，共17个A-及以上学科，工科与医学实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业保持推荐热度。上海市2026年普通高考考生约66700人，较2025年49276人大幅增加约35%，竞争显著加剧；华中科技大学位于湖北省武汉市，非本省高校，在上海无地域招生倾斜。该校在全国招生规模较大，上海招生计划约46–49人，占比极小，属跨省招生正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的异常波动、2026年小幅扩招（+3人）的缓解效应、以及上海市考生总数大幅增加（+35%）带来的竞争加剧，在，判断2026年位次将基本维持2025年水平附近。预测最低位次约4256名，波动区间3830–4682名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机学院）
- 电子信息类（未来技术实验班）
- 临床医学（八年医）
- 人工智能/机器人工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 光电信息科学与工程
- 电子信息类（电信学院）
- 自动化类
- 数学类
- 机械类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 物理学类
- 生物医学工程类
- 数字经济（AI双学位）
- 管理科学与工程类（2021–2022年招生）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3830–4682名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（3830名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、临床医学八年医等一档专业；位次在区间中段（约4000–4500名）应以电气工程、光电信息、自动化等二档优势专业为主；位次接近区间上限（约4600名以上）建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次相对靠后的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shanghai comprehensive subjects were 3794→3362→3118→2962→4096 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a gradual upward trend (from 3794 to 2962), but in 2025, there was a significant drop, moving back 1134 places compared to 2024, the largest fluctuation in the past five years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4096. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai comprehensive subjects was 46 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and it will increase to 49 students in 2026, an expansion of 3 students (about 6.5%) compared to 2025. The expansion means a slight easing of competition, but the extent is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 9th (top 10 nationally), with stable rankings at 8–9 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with journalism and communication disciplines ranking steadily among the top nationally, and the cafeteria conditions receiving widespread praise (ranked first among national university cafeterias); Douyin popularity is relatively high (total ranking 22/106), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications; no obvious admission gaps or negative public opinion records have been observed; in the fifth round of discipline evaluations, mechanical engineering, optical engineering, and electrical engineering received A+, computer science and technology, control science and engineering, materials science and engineering, and 9 other disciplines received A, clinical medicine, biomedical engineering, and 6 other disciplines received A-, totaling 17 disciplines at A- or above, with strong engineering and medical strengths, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly recommended in society; medical majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology maintain recommendation popularity. In 2026, the number of regular college entrance examination students in Shanghai is approximately 66,700, a significant increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 in 2025, intensifying competition; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, not a local university in Shanghai, with no regional enrollment preference in Shanghai. The university has a large national enrollment scale, with the Shanghai enrollment plan of about 46–49 students, a very small proportion, which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal large fluctuation in rankings in 2025, the slight expansion in 2026 (+3 students) as a mitigating effect, and the intensified competition due to a significant increase in the number of Shanghai examinees (+35%), it is judged that the 2026 ranking will basically remain near the 2025 level. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4256, with a fluctuation range of 3830–4682.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (School of Computer Science)
- Electronic Information (Future Technology Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Artificial Intelligence/Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Electronic Information (School of Telecommunications)
- Automation
- Mathematics
- Mechanical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Physics
- Biomedical Engineering
- Digital Economy (AI Dual Degree)
- Management Science and Engineering (Enrolled in 2021–2022).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3830–4682, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 flagship majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3830), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program); if the ranking is in the middle of the range (about 4000–4500), prioritize Tier 2 advantageous majors such as Electrical Engineering, Optoelectronic Information, and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above about 4600), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings.
